title: An Act to Create a Process for the Residents of a Municipality to Withdraw from a School Union
last_house_action: 2/26/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/3/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on December 3, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2
Reports READ. On motion by Senator RAFFERTY of York The Majority Ought to Pass Report ACCEPTED. Bill READ ONCE ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.
COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED. READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative MURPHY of Scarborough, the Majority Ought to Pass Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
